contract.name: v2/agency/toptier_code/sub_agency.md
contract.description: Returns sub-agency obligation and award counts (with office rollups) for a toptier agency in a fiscal year, supporting pagination and award-type filtering.

toptier_code.description: Identifies the CGAC/FREC toptier agency to summarize.
toptier_code.constraints: Required 3-4 digit numeric string; unknown codes return JSON 404, non-numeric codes hit HTML 404.

fiscal_year.description: Fiscal year to aggregate award activity for.
fiscal_year.constraints: Optional; integer 2008-2026 inclusive; defaults to 2026; non-integer rejected with 400.

agency_type.description: Selects whether to aggregate by awarding or funding hierarchy.

award_type_codes.description: Filters results to specific award type codes; send as repeated query parameters.
award_type_codes.constraints: Optional; accepts ['02','03','04','05','06','07','08','09','10','11','A','B','C','D','IDV_A','IDV_B','IDV_B_A','IDV_B_B','IDV_B_C','IDV_C','IDV_D','IDV_E','-1','no intersection']; invalid values rejected with 400; '-1' and 'no intersection' return empty results.

order.description: Sort direction for the selected field.

sort.description: Field to sort sub-agency results by.

page.constraints: Optional; minimum 1; defaults to 1; <1 rejected with 422; non-integer rejected with 400.

limit.description: Number of sub-agency rows per page.
limit.constraints: Optional; range 1-100; defaults to 10; values outside range rejected with 422; non-integer rejected with 400.

toptier_code.description: Echo of the requested toptier code.

fiscal_year.description: Fiscal year represented in the aggregation.

page_metadata.description: Pagination details for the current result set.

page.description: Current page number, mirrors request even when empty.

total.description: Total number of matching sub-agency records.

limit.description: Maximum rows per page used for this response.

next.description: Next page number when more data exists; otherwise null.

previous.description: Previous page number when applicable; otherwise null.

hasNext.description: True when another page is available.

hasPrevious.description: True when a prior page exists.

results.description: Sub-agency aggregates matching the filters; may be empty when no results.

total_obligations.description: Total obligations attributed to the sub-agency (can be negative).

new_award_count.description: Number of new awards in the aggregation.

children.description: Office-level rollups under the sub-agency; array is present but may be empty.

name.description: Office name; null observed for historical records.

total_obligations.description: Obligations attributed to the office (can be negative).

messages.description: Warnings or disclaimers; includes DATA Act coverage notice for FY 2008 results.

results.name: Assistant Secretary for Public and Indian Housing

children.name: PIH : PIH NYNRO;OFFICE OF PUBLIC H

results.name: Assistant Secretary for Housing--Federal Housing Commissioner
Assistant Secretary for Public and Indian Housing
Department of Housing and Urban Development

messages: Account data powering this endpoint were first collected in FY2017 Q2 under the DATA Act; as such, there are no data available for prior fiscal years.

quirks: Sort defaults to 'total_obligations' descending; combining sort=name without order yields reverse alphabetical order.
award_type_codes accept sentinel values '-1' and 'no intersection' that return empty result sets despite missing from docs.
page_metadata.total reports total record count (not page count) and mirrors the request's page even when results are empty.
Totals and office-level obligations can be negative, and children arrays may be empty with null office names in historical data.
Non-numeric toptier codes return an HTML 404 response while unknown numeric codes return JSON.
risks: Clients expecting JSON errors must handle HTML 404 pages when the toptier path is non-numeric.
Some toptier codes (e.g., 247) respond with 503 Service Unavailable and no JSON payload.
Large responses with extensive children arrays can impact consumers if limit remains high.
Negative obligation values may break consumers that assume non-negative aggregates.
Office-level arrays can be empty or contain null names, so downstream systems must treat them as optional.
gaps: Semantics of the '-1' and 'no intersection' award_type_codes sentinels remain undisclosed.

results.name: Assistant Secretary for Public and Indian Housing

children.name: PIH : PIH NYNRO;OFFICE OF PUBLIC H

probes.notes: Default awarding view returns FY 2026 data with seven sub-agency rows.

results.name: Assistant Secretary for Public and Indian Housing

messages: Account data powering this endpoint were first collected in FY2017 Q2 under the DATA Act; as such, there are no data available for prior fiscal years.

probes.notes: FY 2008 request populates DATA Act disclaimer and shows empty children arrays.
Values below 2008 are rejected with 422 and explicit min bound.
Sentinel '-1' is accepted and yields an empty result set.

response.body:
Not Found

The requested resource was not found on this server.

probes.notes: Non-numeric toptier codes return an HTML 404 page instead of JSON error payload.
Certain toptier codes (e.g., 247) respond with 503 Service Unavailable and no JSON body.

mismatches: Docs describe the endpoint as listing Federal/Treasury accounts, but live responses provide sub-agency-level award aggregates with office children.
Documentation implies office child names are always present, yet probes show null office names for historical records.
Docs omit sentinel award_type_codes '-1' and 'no intersection' even though the API accepts them.
gaps: Semantics of the '-1' and 'no intersection' award_type_codes sentinels remain undisclosed.
risks: Clients expecting JSON errors must handle HTML 404 pages when the toptier path is non-numeric.
Certain toptier codes can return 503 Service Unavailable without JSON, requiring resilient error handling.
Large nested children arrays may inflate payload size unless callers manage pagination and limits.
Negative obligation values may break consumers that assume non-negative aggregates.
Office children arrays may be empty or contain null names, so consumers must treat those fields as optional.
